title: Scramble City
synopsis: A standalone OVA depicting the construction of the Autobot mobile fortress Scramble City and the resulting battle between Autobot and Decepticon combiners. Released only in Japan.

episodes.title: Scramble City
episodes.synopsis: The Autobots secretly construct Scramble City, a massive mobile fortress. When the Decepticons discover the project, an all-out battle erupts featuring the combiner teams — Superion, Defensor, Menasor, Bruticus, and the debut of Metroplex.

facts: Scramble City was a Japan-only OVA released on April 1, 1986.
It introduced the 'Scramble' gimmick where combiner limbs could interchange between teams.
